title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Examples behavior contributes positive environment community include: Demonstrating empathy kindness toward people respectful differing opinions, viewpoints, experiences Giving gracefully accepting constructive feedback Accepting responsibility apologizing affected mistakes, learning experience Focusing best just us individuals, overall community Examples unacceptable behavior include: use sexualized language imagery, sexual attention advances kind Trolling, insulting derogatory comments, personal political attacks Public private harassment Publishing others’ private information, physical email address, without explicit permission conduct reasonably considered inappropriate professional setting

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct applies within community spaces, also applies individual officially representing community public spaces. Examples representing community include using official e-mail address, posting via official social media account, acting appointed representative online offline event.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct

title: Contributing to glyfun
text: want make bigger change, ’s good idea first file issue make sure someone team agrees ’s needed. ’ve found bug, please file issue illustrates bug minimal reprex (also help write unit test, needed). See guide create great issue advice.

title: Contributing to glyfun
text: Fork package clone onto computer. haven’t done , recommend using usethis::create_from_github("glycoverse/glyfun", fork = TRUE). Install development dependencies devtools::install_dev_deps(), make sure package passes R CMD check running devtools::check(). R CMD check doesn’t pass cleanly, ’s good idea ask help continuing. Create Git branch pull request (PR). recommend using usethis::pr_init("brief-description--change"). Make changes, commit git, create PR running usethis::pr_push(), following prompts browser. title PR briefly describe change. body PR contain Fixes #issue-number. user-facing changes, add bullet top NEWS.md (.e. just first header). Follow style described https://style.tidyverse.org/news.html.

title: Contributing to glyfun
text: New code follow tidyverse style guide. can use Air apply style, please don’t restyle code nothing PR. use roxygen2, Markdown syntax, documentation. use testthat unit tests. Contributions test cases included easier accept.

title: Contributing to glyfun
text: Please note glyfun project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project agree abide terms.

what: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
title: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
text: glyfun provides glycan-centric functional enrichment glycoproteomics, moving beyond general protein-level descriptions. Traditional: “functions enriched dysregulated glycoproteins?” glyfun: “functions enriched proteins dysregulated core-fucosylation?” Higher specificity, deeper insights. focusing distinct glycan motifs, glyfun helps pinpoint functional relevance specific glycosylation changes.

title: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
text: glyfun package core glycoverse package. need install individually even installed meta-package glycoverse. Note: package still development productive use. Install development version (recommended):

title: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
text: 🚀 Get started: 📚 Reference:

title: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
text: glyfun integrates seamlessly glydet (calculating site-specific derived traits motif quantification) glystats (differential expression analysis). final piece glycoproteomics analytical puzzle, glyfun bridges gap raw glycan quantification biological insight, enabling researchers move beyond data processing functional glycomining.

title: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)

what: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
title: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
text: function first groups proteins dea_res according , performs GO ORA analysis clusterProfiler::compareCluster() clusterProfiler::enrichGO()

title: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
code: gc_ora_go(   dea_res,   by = NULL,   dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,   dea_log2fc_cutoff = c(-1, 1),   orgdb = "org.Hs.eg.db",   ont = "MF",   universe = NULL,   p_adj_method = "BH",   p_cutoff = 0.05,   q_cutoff = 0.2 )

title: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
text: dea_res Differential analysis result. Can one : Result glystats::gly_limma() (two groups), glystats::gly_ttest(), glystats::gly_wilcox(), called glyexp::experiment() "traitproteomics" type. tibble following columns: protein: Uniprot ID proteins trait: glycosylation trait (e.g. "TFc" proportion core-fucosylated glycans) p_val: p-values, preferably adjusted p-values log2FC: log2 fold change column group proteins . dea_res glyexp::experiment(): column name var_info experiment. dea_res tibble: column name tibble (defaults "trait"). dea_p_cutoff P-value cutoff statistical significance. Defaults 0.05. glystats result input, adjusted p-values used. dea_log2fc_cutoff Log2 fold change cutoff statistical significance. length-2 numeric vector, negative positive boundaries, respectively. example, c(-1, 1) means "log2FC < -1 log2FC > 1", c(-Inf, 1) means "log2FC > 1". Defaults c(-1, 1). orgdb Passed OrgDb clusterProfiler::enrichGO(). ont Passed ont clusterProfiler::enrichGO(). "BP", "MF", "CC", "". Defaults "MF". universe Background genes. character vector, directly passed universe downstream clusterProfiler function. can also provide glyexp::experiment() object "glycoproteomics" type. case detected proteins experiment extracted passed clusterProfiler function. p_adj_method Passed pAdjustMethod downstream clusterProfiler function. p_cutoff Passed pvalueCutoff downstream clusterProfiler function. q_cutoff Passed qvalueCutoff downstream clusterProfiler function.

title: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
text: list two elements: tidy_result: tibble enrichment results containing following columns: trait: Glycan trait id: Term ID description: Term description gene_ratio: Ratio genes term total genes input bg_ratio: Ratio genes term total genes background rich_factor: Proportion term's total background genes found input fold_enrichment: Ratio gene_ratio bg_ratio (magnitude enrichment) z_score: Directional trend regulation (positive , negative ) p_val: Raw p-value hypergeometric test p_adj: Adjusted p-value q_val: Q-value (FDR) gene_id: Gene IDs term (separated "/") count: Number genes term raw_result: raw clusterProfiler clusterProfResult object list classes glystats_go_ora_res glystats_res.

title: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
text: traditional glycoproteomics data analysis, usually perform differential expression analysis (DEA) glycoforms, extract proteins dysregulated glycosylation, perform functional enrichment (e.g. GO) proteins. enrichment functions glystats (e.g. glystats::gly_enrich_go()). glyfun functions differ link specific glycan traits functional annotations. Instead answering question "functions enriched dysregulated glycoproteins?", glyfun answers questions like “functions enriched proteins dysregulated core-fucosylation?” Higher specificity, deeper insights. focusing distinct glycan motifs, glyfun helps pinpoint functional relevance specific glycosylation changes.

title: Glycan-Centric GO Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_go
text: common pattern using function :
code: # 1. Use `glydet` to calculate derived traits or motif quantification. trait_exp <- derive_traits(exp)  # or `quantify_motifs()`  # 2. Perform differential analysis with `glystats`. dea_res <- gly_ttest(trait_exp)  # 3. Use this function. go_res <- gc_ora_go(dea_res)

what: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
title: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
text: function first groups proteins dea_res according , performs KEGG ORA analysis clusterProfiler::compareCluster() clusterProfiler::enrichKEGG()

title: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
code: gc_ora_kegg(   dea_res,   by = NULL,   dea_p_cutoff = 0.05,   dea_log2fc_cutoff = c(-1, 1),   organism = "hsa",   universe = NULL,   p_adj_method = "BH",   p_cutoff = 0.05,   q_cutoff = 0.2 )

title: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
text: dea_res Differential analysis result. Can one : Result glystats::gly_limma() (two groups), glystats::gly_ttest(), glystats::gly_wilcox(), called glyexp::experiment() "traitproteomics" type. tibble following columns: protein: Uniprot ID proteins trait: glycosylation trait (e.g. "TFc" proportion core-fucosylated glycans) p_val: p-values, preferably adjusted p-values log2FC: log2 fold change column group proteins . dea_res glyexp::experiment(): column name var_info experiment. dea_res tibble: column name tibble (defaults "trait"). dea_p_cutoff P-value cutoff statistical significance. Defaults 0.05. glystats result input, adjusted p-values used. dea_log2fc_cutoff Log2 fold change cutoff statistical significance. length-2 numeric vector, negative positive boundaries, respectively. example, c(-1, 1) means "log2FC < -1 log2FC > 1", c(-Inf, 1) means "log2FC > 1". Defaults c(-1, 1). organism KEGG organism code. Passed organism clusterProfiler::enrichKEGG(). Defaults "hsa" (Homo sapiens). Common codes: "hsa" (human), "mmu" (mouse), "rno" (rat). universe Background genes. character vector, directly passed universe downstream clusterProfiler function. can also provide glyexp::experiment() object "glycoproteomics" type. case detected proteins experiment extracted passed clusterProfiler function. p_adj_method Passed pAdjustMethod downstream clusterProfiler function. p_cutoff Passed pvalueCutoff downstream clusterProfiler function. q_cutoff Passed qvalueCutoff downstream clusterProfiler function.

title: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
text: list two elements: tidy_result: tibble enrichment results containing following columns: trait: Glycan trait id: KEGG pathway ID description: Pathway description gene_ratio: Ratio genes pathway total genes input bg_ratio: Ratio genes pathway total genes background rich_factor: Proportion pathway's total background genes found input fold_enrichment: Ratio gene_ratio bg_ratio (magnitude enrichment) z_score: Directional trend regulation (positive , negative ) p_val: Raw p-value hypergeometric test p_adj: Adjusted p-value q_val: Q-value (FDR) gene_id: Gene IDs pathway (separated "/") count: Number genes pathway raw_result: raw clusterProfiler clusterProfResult object list classes glyfun_ora_kegg_res glyfun_ora_res.

title: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
text: traditional glycoproteomics data analysis, usually perform differential expression analysis (DEA) glycoforms, extract proteins dysregulated glycosylation, perform functional enrichment (e.g. KEGG) proteins. enrichment functions glystats (e.g. glystats::gly_enrich_kegg()). glyfun functions differ link specific glycan traits functional annotations. Instead answering question "functions enriched dysregulated glycoproteins?", glyfun answers questions like "pathways enriched proteins dysregulated core-fucosylation?" Higher specificity, deeper insights. focusing distinct glycan motifs, glyfun helps pinpoint functional relevance specific glycosylation changes.

title: Glycan-Centric KEGG Over Representation Analysis — gc_ora_kegg
text: common pattern using function :
code: # 1. Use `glydet` to calculate derived traits or motif quantification. trait_exp <- derive_traits(exp)  # or `quantify_motifs()`  # 2. Perform differential analysis with `glystats`. dea_res <- gly_ttest(trait_exp)  # 3. Use this function. kegg_res <- gc_ora_kegg(dea_res)
